text: Stock markets rose after a stronger earnings season while investors watched inflation data and central bank policy signals.
Retail companies reported higher online sales as consumers searched for discounts delivery options and flexible payment plans.
A major airline announced new routes and fuel savings helping its revenue forecast improve despite competition.
Banking leaders said small firms are seeking more credit as demand returns in construction logistics and hospitality.
The prime minister defended the budget in parliament and said public spending would support health care and education.
Opposition leaders called for an inquiry after ministers faced questions about campaign donations and contracts.
Voters will go to the polls next month after election officials confirmed the final candidate list.
Lawmakers debated a security bill that would expand privacy protections while increasing cyber attack penalties.
The football club moved to the top of the league after a late goal sealed a dramatic win.
A tennis champion reached the final after serving powerfully and winning key points under pressure.
The national cricket team completed a series victory as bowlers controlled the middle overs.
Basketball fans celebrated after the star guard scored thirty points in the playoff match.
The actor received strong reviews for a new drama film that opened at the festival.
A popular singer announced a world tour with concerts in major cities and songs from the latest album.
Streaming audiences watched a comedy series in record numbers after social media clips gained attention.
The awards ceremony honored directors musicians writers and performers during a televised event.
Researchers unveiled a faster processor designed for mobile devices with better battery life.
A cybersecurity company warned businesses to update servers after analysts found a serious vulnerability.
The startup launched a cloud platform that helps teams manage data pipelines and automate routine tasks.
Developers released an open source database update with faster search encryption and backup tools.
A software company introduced new artificial intelligence tools for developers building secure cloud applications and faster digital products.
